name: Beef Cheese Ball
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cream cheese (yogurt cheese would be just fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred 2 jars of chipped beef and sauté in 2 tablespoons butter.
2. Combine half of the shredded beef with a teaspoon of prepared mustard.
3. Roll this mixture into a ball, then roll it in the remaining shredded chipped beef.
